title: DecisionReceipt APLUS v1
description: The full APLUS decision receipt: ties together policy digest, hard boundary digest, boundary validation digest, audit chain tip, Merkle checkpoint, and evidence bundle manifest into a single signed artifact. Every field after receipt_version through evidence_bundle_manifest_digest is required in STRICT — a missing digest means the auditor cannot verify that component without re-running the server. intent-receipt.v1 is the server's existing receipt; this schema is the audit-grade wrapper the verifier and compliance teams use.

receipt_version.description: Schema version of this receipt. Must match the schema_id in schema-registry.v3.json.

decision_id.description: UUID v4 identifying this decision. Matches intent_id in the underlying IntentReceipt.

policy_digest.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON of the PolicyPack active at decision time. Allows auditors to retrieve and verify the exact policy that approved/blocked.

policy_epoch.description: Policy epoch at decision time. Must be >= 1 (epoch 0 = no policy loaded = DEV only).

hard_boundary_digest.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON of the HardBoundarySpec active at decision time. Binds decisions to the exact network/IAM/secrets configuration in force.

hard_boundary_validation_digest.description: SHA-256 of the most recent HardBoundaryValidationResult at decision time. Proves that bypass tests A–F were run and passed under the current boundary configuration.

audit_chain_tip_digest.description: audit_digest of the latest record in the audit chain at the moment this receipt was issued. Pins the receipt to a specific chain position — the verifier can prove this decision is in the chain.

merkle_checkpoint_digest.description: merkle_root of the most recent CHECKPOINT record. Provides range proof over the chain window preceding this receipt without requiring the full chain.

evidence_bundle_manifest_digest.description: SHA-256 of the EvidenceBundleManifest for this decision. The manifest lists all leaf artifacts (network logs, IAM events, audit chain slice) with their own digests.

outcome.description: Decision outcome. Maps to: ALLOW=approved, DENY=blocked, PENDING_REVIEW=human review required.

reason_codes.description: Rule IDs or codes that produced the outcome. Empty for ALLOW. For DENY: the rule_id that blocked.

lifecycle_state.description: Fine-grained lifecycle position, matching intent-receipt lifecycle_state field.

tool_class.description: DTM side-effect class of the adapter executing this decision.

readback_status.description: Post-execution readback result. mismatch triggers autonomy clamp.

break_glass_active.description: True if a break-glass window was active when this receipt was issued.

receipt_sig.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest over the canonical JSON of the receipt body, keyed with DOTINK_SECRET_KEY.

allOf.description: STRICT: break_glass_active must be present (not absent — false is fine).
